response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise across multiple domains (web, mobile, desktop, embedded) and has experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling. While his background is impressive, his direct experience with AI strategy and cloud technologies at a principal-engineer level is less explicitly highlighted, though his entrepreneurial and open-source contributions suggest adaptability.
strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience (15+ years) with a focus on testable, user-centric projects.
Entrepreneurial and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) showcasing innovation and leadership.
Diverse technical stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, Kubernetes) with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of AI/ML product leadership or cloud strategy at a principal-engineer level.
No advanced degree in an AI-related field (only a Bachelor's in Computer Science).
Experience is heavily weighted toward development rather than high-level AI/cloud strategy or customer advisory roles.
